summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Edit Staff, Leave Tracker, and Mess Module. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend E2E tests passed including dialog interactions, form submissions, and data persistence verification.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended
Duplicate staff entries visible (Dr. Priya Sharma, Rahul Kumar, Meera Patel appear twice) - may be data issue or display bug

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/leaves - create half-day leave with time
Backend: GET /api/leaves/summary - returns leave summary by staff
Backend: GET /api/mess/settings - returns default prices (Breakfast:80, Lunch:120, Dinner:120, Snacks:50, Tea/Coffee:30)
Backend: POST /api/mess/meals - assign meal to patient
Backend: GET /api/mess/meals - returns meals by date
Frontend: HR page loads with summary cards
Frontend: Edit Staff dialog opens with prefilled data
Frontend: Edit Staff save works with toast notification
Frontend: Staff dropdown in leave form works
Frontend: Half-day checkbox shows time fields
Frontend: Leave creation works with toast notification
Frontend: Leave appears in table after creation
Frontend: Mess page loads via sidebar navigation
Frontend: Mess summary cards display correctly
Frontend: Meal Prices tab shows default prices
Frontend: Set Prices dialog opens with editable fields
Frontend: Patient dropdown in meal form works
Frontend: Meal assignment works with toast notification
Frontend: Meal appears in Today's Meals table
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - add DialogDescription or aria-describedby prop
Staff list shows duplicate entries - investigate if this is a data seeding issue or display bug
seed_data_creation: Test leave and meal records were created and deleted during E2E testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three new features (Edit Staff, Leave Tracker, Mess Module) are fully functional. Backend APIs working correctly with proper error handling (404 for non-existent resources). Frontend dialogs, forms, and data persistence all working. Default meal prices: Breakfast ₹80, Lunch ₹120, Dinner ₹120, Snacks ₹50, Tea/Coffee ₹30. Note: Previous test report had wrong admin password (admin123 vs admin1234).

edit_staff.details: Edit button opens dialog with prefilled data, save persists changes, toast notification shown

leave_tracker.details: Record Leave button opens dialog, staff selection works, half-day with time fields works, leave types (casual/sick/earned/other) work, delete works

mess_module.details: Accessible via sidebar, summary cards show patients fed/day total/breakfast/lunch counts, Meal Prices tab shows all 5 meal types with prices, Set Prices dialog allows editing, Assign Meal dialog with patient dropdown and meal checkboxes works, total calculation correct, Today's Meals table shows assigned meals with delete option
